name: Easy Rhubarb Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the rhubarb into an ungreased 9 x 13 inch cake pan.
2. Pour the sugar over the rhubarb.
3. Mix the cake mix according to the package directions.
4. Pour the cake mixture over the rhubarb-sugar layer.
5. Pour the whipping cream over everything.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
